reviews.comment:
Un desastre,12 del mediodía descargan el combustible en la hora pico anulando 4 bocas de expendio,al gerente de la estación lo tiene que hechar por inútil,40 minutos para cargar,hasta los playeros no lo pueden creer.

(Translated by Google)
A disaster, at 12 noon they unload the fuel during rush hour, shutting down 4 pumps, the station manager has to be fired for being useless, 40 minutes to fill up, even the attendants can't believe it.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar nuestra parada obligatoria en nuestras vacaciones......  la parte de la estacion de servicio excelente atencion nos atendio una playera re amable muy predipuesta  nos tuvo paciencia ya q no teniamos descargada la app y nos ayudo a configurarla para poder usarla en el restaurant excelentes las medialunas espectaculares!!!! Obvio q los volveremos a elegir como siempre!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, a must-stop on our vacation! The service station was excellent; a very friendly and helpful attendant assisted us. She was patient with us since we didn't have the app downloaded and helped us set it up so we could use it in the restaurant. The croissants were spectacular! Of course, we'll choose them again, as always!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pCR1JVdEJhbTFtYlc0d2JFOUllalJ3UzBGMFRIYxAB
